cases.prompt: Run a dark-fantasy RTS vertical slice from market research through QA and release operations.
cases.expectation: Starts the complete game-production harness.

cases.prompt: Design fair growth and counterplay for heroes and unlimited-growth characters in our strategy game.
cases.expectation: Routes through quantitative systems, economy, and QA gates.

cases.prompt: Before release, verify our game monetization has no P2W, transparent pricing, and a rollback plan.
cases.expectation: Routes through PM, QA, and live-operations gates.

cases.prompt: Research comparable dark-fantasy RTS games before creating evidence-grounded production milestones.
cases.expectation: Requires survey before BMAD-GDS production decisions.

cases.prompt: Run 20 adversarial playtest iterations across seven player perspectives for our strategy game.
cases.expectation: Applies the 20-loop QA contract and stop-ship gates.

cases.prompt: The engine is undecided; establish a game production system covering RTS input, pathing, and deterministic replay.
cases.expectation: Routes to the engine-agnostic harness.

cases.prompt: Put worldbuilding, VFX readability, accessibility, and economy balance under one verified game-production workflow.
cases.expectation: Routes to experience, systems, and QA artifact contracts.

cases.prompt: Ensure unlimited-growth characters cannot dominate the meta by validating p50/p90 progression and economy sources/sinks.
cases.expectation: Routes to systems economy and QA gates.

cases.prompt: Create a production harness that sends QA failures into bounded producer review without violating vetoes.
cases.expectation: Applies immutable artifacts and bounded QA re-entry.

cases.prompt: Coordinate research, monetization, implementation, red-team testing, and rollback for a live-service game.
cases.expectation: Starts the full game-studio harness.

cases.prompt: Fix this TypeScript null-handling bug.
cases.expectation: Routes to general debugging.

cases.prompt: Find the first compiler error in this Unity Editor build log.
cases.expectation: Routes to game build-log triage.

cases.prompt: How do I unwrap UVs for this Blender character model?
cases.expectation: Routes to 3D-production help.

cases.prompt: Write three Steam capsule taglines for our game.
cases.expectation: Routes to store or marketing work.

cases.prompt: Show GDScript that plays a button-click sound in Godot.
cases.expectation: Routes to a narrow engine implementation task.

cases.prompt: Recommend lunch for today.
cases.expectation: Handles as general conversation.

cases.prompt: Write a PostgreSQL migration that adds an index.
cases.expectation: Routes to database work.

cases.prompt: Brainstorm five horror-game ideas.
cases.expectation: Routes to initial ideation.

cases.prompt: Analyze an Unreal GPU frame-time profiler capture.
cases.expectation: Routes to the game performance profiler.

cases.prompt: Prioritize existing playtest survey responses.
cases.expectation: Routes to game-demo feedback triage.
